subject: [PATCH v2 01/10] nfsd: fix cpntf publish race in nfs4_init_cp_state

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a race condition in the NFSv4 server's cpntf publish mechanism. The issue arises when a concurrent OFFLOAD_CANCEL operation reaches manage_cpntf_state() before the new cpntf entry is fully linked onto its parent stid's sc_cp_list. To fix this, the patch folds the cs_type assignment and list_add into the same critical section as idr_alloc_cyclic(), ensuring that a concurrent lookup either misses the entry or sees a fully linked cp_list. The patch also initializes the list_head with INIT_LIST_HEAD() and switches _free_cpntf_state_locked() to list_del_init() to prevent stale unlinks.
